name: robzilla1738/Codex-Workflows
summary: Workflow-as-code runtime for Codex review fanout, with sandboxed workflow definitions, durable run state, structured finding handoff between phases, validation gates, and pause/resume workflow controls.
evidence: Loads `workflow()` definitions inside a QuickJS sandbox, validates phase and agent schemas, caps concurrency and agent count, and passes selected findings forward through `contextFrom` modes.

Persists each run under Codex workflow storage with `status.json`, `events.jsonl`, agent prompts/results, control commands, heartbeat/orphan detection, and final reports while exposing CLI, TUI, and MCP controls.
